mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, phone, password, promo_code, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, name, email, phone, password, promo_code, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (name, email, phone, password, promo_code, role) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{promoCode}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, phone, promo_code, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
